description_long: This is a sleek, high-performance Formula-style sports car with a striking gold and purple color scheme. The car features an aerodynamic body with a low, wide stance, prominent front and rear wings, and open wheels designed for maximum speed and agility. The cockpit is centrally located and enclosed by a protective halo, with visible air intakes and streamlined side pods. The wheels are large, with intricate multi-spoke rims that match the car's color palette. The rear of the car is equipped with a large, elevated spoiler for enhanced downforce, and the overall design emphasizes speed, precision, and advanced engineering. This vehicle is built for racing and would stand out in any urban or motorsport environment.
description: A gold and purple Formula-style sports car with open wheels, aerodynamic wings, and a large rear spoiler, designed for high-speed racing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide front wing, open cockpit, and aerodynamic nose.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the elongated body, side pods, and large rear wing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the prominent rear spoiler, rear wheels, and exhaust area.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with clear visibility of the wheel design and aerodynamic features.
attribute_wheel_design: multi-spoke gold and purple rims with intricate pattern
